_comment: Hyperparameters and training settings for HITL-HAR. Adjust these to tune behaviour without touching source code.

threshold._comment_strategy: Currently only 'f1' is supported (maximise F1 on validation PR curve). Reserved for future: 'fixed', 'precision_at_recall'.
threshold._comment_nudge: Seed heads are not retrained; their threshold is nudged to mean_p * seed_nudge_factor, clamped to [min, current_threshold].

cooccurrence._comment: A head 'fires' on a new activity's windows if the fraction of windows predicted positive exceeds this value.

sensor_gating._comment: Steepness of the sigmoid used to convert hint weights [0,1] into gate values. Higher = sharper cutoff.

replay_buffer._comment: null = unlimited. Set an integer to cap stored positives per activity (useful for memory-constrained settings).

hitl_simulation._comment: Controls how the human-in-the-loop interaction is simulated during E2/E3. In a real deployment these would come from actual user input.
hitl_simulation._comment_confirmation: 'ground_truth' uses dataset labels to confirm/deny co-occurrences. Reserved for future: 'noisy' (add label noise), 'conservative' (user only confirms high-confidence detections).
hitl_simulation._comment_noise: Probability of flipping a confirmed co-occurrence (0.0 = perfect human). Only used when confirmation_source='noisy'.
hitl_simulation._comment_me: 'ground_truth' reads mutual exclusions from the dataset config. Reserved for future: 'none' (user never marks ME).
hitl_simulation._comment_budget: null = annotate all windows. Integer = max windows the simulated user reviews per activity addition. Unused for now.
